userIntent: Create a fresh-session-resumable plan for Steps 4-7 of the BCOS Dashboard cockpit-and-drawer rebuild. Steps 1-3 already shipped (translation map / cockpit shell / attention-inbox promoted into cockpit). Remaining work moves the four standalone panels still on the main page (jobs_panel, snapshot_freshness, run_history, file_health) into either a click-driven side drawer (Step 4) or a dedicated /settings route (Step 5), then polishes states (Step 6) and accessibility/responsive/dark-mode (Step 7). Each step ships independently with its own commit. Audience is the average BCOS knowledge worker — non-technical, wants to know if their context system is healthy and what they need to do.
fastTrackReason: Design + IA decisions (cockpit+drawer, knowledge-worker audience, headline copy, dot strip always visible, list-not-prioritize attention, settings as separate route) were already locked in extensive Part 1 + Part 2 deliberation in the prior session; user explicitly invoked clear-planner to capture the manifest, not to re-litigate the design.

steps.name: Understand Intent
steps.result: Steps 4-7 of cockpit-and-drawer rebuild for the standalone bcos-dashboard. Goal: produce artifacts a fresh session can pick up from cold.

steps.name: Run Discovery
steps.result: Skipped formal discovery scripts. The bcos-dashboard is a self-contained module under .claude/scripts/bcos-dashboard/; no new skills/agents are being created. All relevant ecosystem context is captured in the implementation-plan's 'Architecture facts' section.

steps.name: Detect Scenario
steps.result: AGENTING (modifying files under .claude/scripts/). No DOCUMENTATION secondary — dashboard is read-only against docs/.

steps.name: Gather Context
steps.result: Pre-gathered from prior session. Architecture facts, decision log, and per-step design specs all captured in implementation-plan.md sections 4-7.

steps.name: Load Scenario Template
steps.result: AGENTING template. FIXED START done (discovery). DYNAMIC MIDDLE = phases 1-4 (one per Step). FIXED END = integration audit + ecosystem state + learnings (phase 5).

gate.name: approach_alignment
gate.rationale: Approach already approved across 6+ AskUserQuestion rounds in the prior session.
